parameters.query: SELECT message FROM n8n_chat_histories WHERE session_id = 'synweb_aud_{{ $json.slotNumber }}_{{ $json.sessionId }}' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20

INSERT INTO n8n_chat_histories (session_id, message) VALUES ('synweb_aud_{{ $('Prep Audience').item.json.slotNumber }}_{{ $('Prep Audience').item.json.sessionId }}', '{"type":"constructor","id":["langchain_core","messages","HumanMessage"],"kwargs":{"content":"{{ $('Prep Audience').item.json.cleanMessage.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/"/g, '\\"') }}","additional_kwargs":{},"response_metadata":{}}}'), ('synweb_aud_{{ $('Prep Audience').item.json.slotNumber }}_{{ $('Prep Audience').item.json.sessionId }}', '{"type":"constructor","id":["langchain_core","messages","AIMessage"],"kwargs":{"content":"{{ $json.content[0].text.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/"/g, '\\"').replace(/\n/g, '\\n') }}","tool_calls":[],"additional_kwargs":{},"response_metadata":{},"invalid_tool_calls":[]}}')

SELECT message FROM n8n_chat_histories WHERE session_id = 'synweb_aud_{{ $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.slotNumber }}_{{ $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.sessionId }}' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20

INSERT INTO n8n_chat_histories (session_id, message) VALUES ('synweb_aud_{{ $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.slotNumber }}_{{ $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.sessionId }}', '{"type":"constructor","id":["langchain_core","messages","HumanMessage"],"kwargs":{"content":"{{ $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.cleanMessage.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/"/g, '\\"') }}","additional_kwargs":{},"response_metadata":{}}}'), ('synweb_aud_{{ $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.slotNumber }}_{{ $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.sessionId }}', '{"type":"constructor","id":["langchain_core","messages","AIMessage"],"kwargs":{"content":"{{ $json.content[0].text.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/"/g, '\\"').replace(/\n/g, '\\n') }}","tool_calls":[],"additional_kwargs":{},"response_metadata":{},"invalid_tool_calls":[]}}')

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({sessionId: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.sessionId, personaId: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').item.json.slotNumber, kind: 'audience_reply', text: ($('Audience Response').isExecuted ? $('Audience Response').first().json.content[0].text : $('Audience Response1').first().json.content[0].text)}) }}
